name: AUTO-CONTINUOUS-DISCOVERY — HubSpot Hourly + Houzz Nightly
_hci_notes: AUTO-CONTINUOUS-DISCOVERY — HubSpot hourly (every :00), Houzz nightly (02:00). Calls /services/continuous-discovery/scan-and-notify for each connector. Evaluates detection status: CHANGES_DETECTED → Houzz BTW-10 full flow; ERROR/STALE → ntfy alert; NO_DATA → silent. Notify only when action required.
